# Documentation images

Drop the screenshots here with these exact filenames (the docs already reference them).

| File | Used in | What it shows |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `hero.png` | `index.md` | Hero shot: StatPrism with a finished analysis (tables + a figure). |
| `full-window-annotated.png` | `getting-started.md` | Annotated full window: results area (left), settings panel (right), menu bar (top). |
| `worked-1-import.png` | `worked-example.md` | Step 1 — imported data in the data viewer (types + ID column). |
| `worked-2-clean.png` | `worked-example.md` | Step 2 — cleaning steps stacked as cards in the chain. |
| `worked-3-analyse.png` | `worked-example.md` | An analysis configured on the right with the assembled result cards (merged former steps 3 & 4). |
| `word-paste.png` | `results-and-export.md` | A StatPrism result and the same content pasted into Word, side by side. |

## Capture settings used

- **UI theme: Dark** for `hero.png` — the signature look; the white result "paper" cards pop
  against the dark chrome.
- **UI theme: Light** for all other shots.
- **Plot theme: Default (light)** throughout — figures sit on the white result cards and land
  on a white Word page.
